identity_lock._doc: These features MUST remain identical across every generation. Any drift = fail.
identity_lock.forehead_stripes: two white vertical stripes, thick and prominent
identity_lock.ears: black with tiny white ear-back spots
identity_lock.spots: round dark spots on arms, body, tail (NOT stripes, NOT tabby)
identity_lock.apron_color: sage green with white bowl-leaf icon
identity_lock.apron_icon: small white bowl with leaf sprout

material_lock._doc: 3D material must be consistent — smooth matte plastic toy aesthetic.
material_lock.surface: clean, no pores, no fur texture, no subsurface scattering

pose_family.description: Standing beside hero object, both paws hugging it from the side
pose_family.use_case: Cover card — mascot interacts with hero object

pose_family.description: Leaning on hero object with one paw, relaxed stance
Facing viewer, one paw waving, friendly smile
One paw on chin, looking at hero object thoughtfully
Holding a small badge or sign in one paw
One paw raised with index finger pointing up, reminder pose

expression_map._doc: Map headline types to appropriate expressions. Prevents emotion mismatch.

presence_rules._doc: When and where mascot can appear in a 6-card set.

generation_rules_pipeline_a: MUST use reference_images.character as exact reference for every generation
MUST generate mascot on transparent background, separate from scene
MUST NOT generate mascot together with background in single prompt
MUST NOT add any text, watermark, or logo to mascot image
Mascot scale relative to hero object: small (mascot is sidekick, not star)
Mascot NEVER obscures hero object or headline text
generation_rules_pipeline_b_seedance: 每集必須生成 mascot_turnaround.png（即使穿預設圍裙也不可跳過）
MUST use reference_images.character_clean (3d_reference_clean.jpg) 為 ref 生成 turnaround
Turnaround 含多角度（正面/3⁄4/側面/背面）+ 多表情
turnaround 上傳即夢作為小靜 identity lock
結尾場景另用 Gemini 生成人物+小靜同框圖作為構圖參考
結尾互動僅限輕撫頭頂，禁止比愛心/OK 等複雜手勢（Seedance 會變形）
小靜固定在 Part2 最後一段蹦跳出場 + 品牌收尾
